## [15:11 - 15:51]

But you can also duplicate your ads as well and this comes back to if you've gone through the graduation framework That's sometimes when you throw your ad into the ocean Facebook doesn't always find the best customers and you can sometimes duplicate that and find good performance as well so You can for example take a winning winning ad Duplicate it three times and let it run in a single ad set and you'll often find the performance differs as well So that's just something to bear in mind and that's that's you know kind of part of scaling So if you've got multiple audiences you've got multiple ad sets multiple ads, that's a big part of scaling out as well So especially when you're looking to scale fast, this is one of the fastest ways of scaling
